character.name: Late-20s Polish human male lawyer-archivist (junior advocate who handles the firm's archive), slim slightly stooped build from too much paper, neat short SANDY BLONDE hair with a side part (NOT brown, NOT dark — clearly blonde), premature reading glasses pushed up the nose, threadbare warm-brown wool cardigan worn OVER a white dress shirt and skinny dark tie (cardigan-and-tie combination, bookish junior-academic register, NOT a suit jacket), dark navy trousers, calm watchful patient expression, ink-stained fingers, holding a folder at his side, full body, 16-bit JRPG, pallette: #d4b878, #e6b08a, #1c2a40, #e8e4d8, #6a4a30, #0d0a08
